## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's content marketing partnership proposal with Clarify and address key questions.](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation with human expertise, starting with an 8-week strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Clarify is evaluating GrowthX alongside other options, aiming to decide within 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach focuses on audience-first strategy, quality content, and iterative optimization](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Contract terms include 8-week initial period (cancellable anytime) followed by 12-month commitment if mutually agreed](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Marketing Approach

  - [Combines AI workflows with human expertise to scale quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Starts with deep audience understanding and topic cluster mapping](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Uses AI for research, writing, fact-checking, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Human editors ensure quality and strategic alignment](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Aims for daily content publishing/refreshing at \~$0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### Clarify's Content Needs and Concerns

  - [Seeking to scale content without compromising quality](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Questions around product-market fit requirement (GrowthX clarified it's more about audience clarity)](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Interest in historical content optimization capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Concerns about contract length and flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

### Strategy Sprint and Ongoing Engagement

  - [6-8 week initial strategy sprint to set foundation and show early results](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Sprint includes technical SEO audit, workflow setup, and initial content creation](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [After sprint, both parties must opt-in to continue engagement](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Ongoing work focuses on scaling successful approaches identified in sprint](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)

### Technical SEO and Implementation

  - [GrowthX can handle minor technical fixes (e.g., sitemap updates, broken link fixes)](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [For major structural changes, GrowthX provides recommendations but doesn't do full redesigns](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Can advise on migrations and act as "insurance policy" for technical SEO issues](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Clarify to internally discuss confidence in target audience/ICP definition](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide follow-up on contract terms and flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Clarify to review full proposal details, including strategy sprint specifics](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [Decision on partnership expected within 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/PH_q8sCYGR-N1mzsvs4_YD614rAv2ox8?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
